text: 🎥 ON TODAY'S SHOW! Pepe Escobar: The ‘Second Coming’ at Hormuz — Trump Blocks the Blockade We welcome back the rockstar of geopolitics, Pepe Escobar, to break down what’s happening around Trump’s blockade of the Strait of Hormuz—who really holds the cards, Trump’s “Second Coming” energy, and an economy under serious strain. Tune in! ➡️ 7PM CET - 8PM MSK - 1PM ET - 10AM PT ➡️ Watch on: YouTube - X - Rumble - Twitch - Kick 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🎥 今日节目！Pepe Escobar：霍尔木兹海峡的“第二次降临”——特朗普阻止了封锁。我们欢迎地缘政治摇滚明星Pepe Escobar回归，剖析特朗普对霍尔木兹海峡封锁周围发生的事情——谁才是真正的掌权者，特朗普的“第二次降临”能量，以及处于严重压力下的经济。敬请收看！ ➡️ 欧洲中部时间晚上7点 - 莫斯科时间晚上8点 - 美国东部时间下午1点 - 太平洋时间上午10点 ➡️ 观看地址：YouTube - X - Rumble - Twitch - Kick 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 The US naval blockade of the Strait of Hormuz is now officially underway. 🔸 15+ US warships in position 🔸 UK Maritime Trade Operations confirming restrictions on Iranian ports across the Persian Gulf, Gulf of Oman and parts of the Arabian Sea 🔸 Trump threatening to destroy any Iranian fast-attack boats that approach: "using the same system of kill that we use against the drug dealers on boats at Sea" Iran's response: no port in the Persian Gulf or Sea of Oman will be safe if Iranian ports are threatened. The IRGC Navy says any military vessel approaching the Strait of Hormuz is a ceasefire violation. The ceasefire and the blockade are now running simultaneously. One of them will break first. WSJ. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国对霍尔木兹海峡的海上封锁现已正式开始。 🔸 15艘以上美国军舰已就位 🔸 英国海上贸易行动办公室确认对波斯湾、阿曼湾和阿拉伯海部分地区的伊朗港口实施限制 🔸 特朗普威胁要摧毁任何靠近的伊朗快速攻击艇：“使用我们打击海上贩毒船只时使用的那种杀戮系统”。伊朗的回应：如果伊朗港口受到威胁，波斯湾或阿曼湾的任何港口都不会安全。伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队海军表示，任何靠近霍尔木兹海峡的军舰都是对停火协议的违反。停火和封锁现在同时进行。其中一个会先崩溃。华尔街日报。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Keir Starmer: Impact of Iran’s behaviour in the Strait is causing untold economic damage.
text_zh: 基尔·斯塔默：伊朗在海峡的行为造成了无法估量的经济损失。

text: Open Source Intel The IDF and Shin Bet struck an armed Hamas cell planning attacks against Israeli forces. Youssef Ibrahim Mahmoud Bashiti was eliminated in the strike. Bashiti was involved in the building collapse that killed 21 IDF soldiers. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043714424758837424/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：以色列国防军和辛贝特打击了一个计划袭击以色列军队的武装哈马斯小组。尤瑟夫·易卜拉欣·马哈茂德·巴希蒂在袭击中被消灭。巴希蒂参与了导致21名以色列国防军士兵死亡的建筑物倒塌事件。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043714424758837424/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer: "We hope the process will continue without further escalation. And that applies to the running sore that is the Strait of Hormuz, shamefully exploited by Iran." "All of the leaders that I met were crystal clear that freedom of navigation is vital and must be restored, no conditions, no tolls and no tolerance of Iran holding the world's economy to ransom." "The impact of Iran's behavior in the Strait is causing untold economic damage." tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：英国首相基尔·斯塔默：“我们希望这一进程能继续下去，而不会进一步升级。这也适用于霍尔木兹海峡这个令人痛苦的顽疾，它正被伊朗可耻地利用。”“我见过的所有领导人都非常清楚，航行自由至关重要，必须恢复，没有条件，没有通行费，也不容忍伊朗将世界经济作为人质。”“伊朗在海峡的行为造成了无法估量的经济损失。” 推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) RT @laraseligman : The U.S. blockade of the Strait of Hormuz has officially gone into effect, and there are more than 15 U.S. warships in place to support the operation, according to a senior U.S. official. Per @shelbyholliday https://www.wsj.com/livecoverage/iran-us-cease-fire-talks-stalled-2026/card/u-s-blockade-of-iran-officially-under-way-Zs0R6YhmAjmOGljdRf5W tweet
text_zh: Status-6 (战争与军事新闻) 转推 @laraseligman：据一位美国高级官员称，美国对霍尔木兹海峡的封锁已正式生效，有超过15艘美国军舰到位以支持该行动。根据 @shelbyholliday 的报道 https://www.wsj.com/livecoverage/iran-us-cease-fire-talks-stalled-2026/card/u-s-blockade-of-iran-officially-under-way-Zs0R6YhmAjmOGljdRf5W 推文

text: Open Source Intel CENTCOM has issued a formal notice: vessels entering the Strait of Hormuz without authorization are subject to interception, diversion, and capture by the U.S. military. CENTCOM: "The blockade will not impede neutral transit passage through the Strait of Hormuz to or from non-Iranian destinations." tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：中央司令部已发布正式通知：未经授权进入霍尔木兹海峡的船只将受到美军的拦截、改道和扣押。中央司令部：“封锁不会阻碍中立船只通过霍尔木兹海峡往返于非伊朗目的地。” 推文

text: Open Source Intel JUST IN 🔴 Senior U.S. official: more than 15 U.S. warships are deployed to support the blockade operation. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043710938763665594/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：突发新闻 🔴 美国高级官员：超过15艘美国军舰已部署以支持封锁行动。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043710938763665594/photo/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender According the Wall Street Journal, citing a senior U.S. official, the U.S. blockade of the Strait of Hormuz is now in effect. Per the official, 15 U.S. warships are in position to enforce the blockade. https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2043710809100988510/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender：据《华尔街日报》援引一位美国高级官员的话称，美国对霍尔木兹海峡的封锁现已生效。据该官员称，15艘美国军舰已就位以执行封锁。https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2043710809100988510/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Footage surfacing today shows two Russian-supplied Mi-28 attack helicopters operated by Iran's military flying over Iran. Footage is undated but claimed to be recent. Iran's Mi-28 deal with Russia was announced in November 2023. A Tasnim defense reporter indicated the first delivery arrived in January 2026. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：今天浮出水面的镜头显示，两架由俄罗斯提供的米-28攻击直升机由伊朗军方操作，在伊朗上空飞行。镜头未注明日期，但据称是最近的。伊朗与俄罗斯的米-28交易于2023年11月宣布。塔斯尼姆通讯社的一名国防记者表示，首批交付于2026年1月抵达。 推文

text: Open Source Intel British PM Keir Starmer: "While the ceasefire between the US, Israel, and Iran is undeniably welcome, it is also highly fragile. We call for Lebanon to be included urgently in the ceasefire. Diplomacy is the right path, and I welcome the talks taking place this week. Hezbollah must disarm. But I'm equally clear: Israel's strikes are wrong. They are having devastating humanitarian consequences and pushing Lebanon into a crisis. The bombing should stop now." tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：英国首相基尔·斯塔默：“虽然美国、以色列和伊朗之间的停火无疑是受欢迎的，但它也非常脆弱。我们呼吁黎巴嫩紧急被纳入停火范围。外交是正确的道路，我欢迎本周进行的会谈。真主党必须解除武装。但我同样清楚：以色列的袭击是错误的。它们正在造成毁灭性的人道主义后果，并将黎巴嫩推向危机。轰炸现在应该停止。” 推文

text: Open Source Intel Lebanese MP Paula Yacoubian to Iran: "Why are you allowed to negotiate directly with the 'Great Satan' but we're not allowed to negotiate with Israel?" https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043707996736233690/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：黎巴嫩议员保拉·雅库比安对伊朗说：“为什么你们被允许直接与‘大撒旦’谈判，而我们却不被允许与以色列谈判？” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043707996736233690/video/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender U.S. President Donald J. Trump said on his Truth Social app that if any Iranian fast-attack vessels approach the now in effect U.S. blockade they will be “immediately eliminated” in the same manner that vessels operated by designated terrorist organizations in the Southern Command area of responsibility are. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender：美国总统唐纳德·J·特朗普在他的“真实社交”应用上表示，如果任何伊朗快速攻击艇靠近现已生效的美国封锁线，它们将以与南方司令部责任区内被指定恐怖组织操作的船只相同的方式“立即被消灭”。 推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 The United States has begun a blockade of the Strait of Hormuz. ▪️ The operation also extends to the Gulf of Oman and the Arabian Sea. ▪️ The U.S. plans to block all Iranian vessels, as well as ships that agree to pay Iran “fees” for passage through the strait. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: Visioner 转推 @NSTRIKE1231：🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国已开始对霍尔木兹海峡进行封锁。 ▪️ 该行动还延伸至阿曼湾和阿拉伯海。 ▪️ 美国计划封锁所有伊朗船只，以及同意向伊朗支付通过海峡“费用”的船只。与我们一起查看最新更新：@NSTRIKE1231 推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) A pair of Russia-supplied Mil Mi-28 attack helicopters operated by the Iranian military spotted somewhere over Iran. Video undated, though appeared today and claimed to be new. https://twitter.com/Archer83Able/status/2043707713339732042/video/1 🇷🇺 🇮🇷 It is believed that Iran has received the first batch of Mil Mi-28NE attack helicopters ordered in Russia. Photos of a Mil Mi-28 helicopter in digital desert camo stationed in a hangar have emerged on social media. The arrival of the first Havocs in Iran was also indicated by a defense reporter for Iranian state-controlled Tasnim news agency earlier in January 2026. The deal to acquire an unspecified number of Mil Mi-28 helicopters by Iran was first announced in November 2023. - Status-6 (War & Military News) tweet
text_zh: Status-6 (战争与军事新闻)：一对由俄罗斯提供的米-28攻击直升机由伊朗军方操作，在伊朗某处被发现。视频未注明日期，但今天出现并声称是新的。https://twitter.com/Archer83Able/status/2043707713339732042/video/1 🇷🇺 🇮🇷 据信，伊朗已收到在俄罗斯订购的首批米-28NE攻击直升机。社交媒体上出现了停在机库中的一架带有数字沙漠迷彩的米-28直升机的照片。伊朗国家控制的塔斯尼姆通讯社的一名国防记者在2026年1月早些时候也指出，首批“浩劫”直升机已抵达伊朗。伊朗购买数量不详的米-28直升机的交易最初于2023年11月宣布。 - Status-6 (战争与军事新闻) 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷WSJ: More than 15 US warships are deployed to support the blockade of Iran, according to US officials. The vessels include an aircraft carrier, destroyers, and support ships involved in maritime operations targeting Iranian shipping. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 WSJ : U.S. President Trump’s naval blockade of the Strait of Hormuz, set to begin Monday at 10am ET, opens a risky new phase in the six‑week conflict. While the U.S. has the resources to enforce the blockade, sustaining control will be difficult. The IRGC still retains over 60% of its fast‑attack boats, and Iran could strike Saudi and UAE bypass pipelines or close the Bab al‑Mandeb strait via proxies. Global economic pain is mounting: Asian factories are curbing production, airports are running out of jet fuel, and Gulf economies are forecast to shrink sharply – Qatar’s GDP by 13%, the UAE’s by 8%, and Saudi Arabia’s by 6.6%. The blockade could strip an additional 2 million barrels per day from global markets. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷华尔街日报：据美国官员称，超过15艘美国军舰已部署以支持对伊朗的封锁。这些船只包括一艘航空母舰、驱逐舰和参与针对伊朗航运的海上行动的支援舰。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 华尔街日报：特朗普总统对霍尔木兹海峡的海上封锁定于周一上午10点（美国东部时间）开始，开启了这场为期六周冲突中危险的新阶段。虽然美国有资源执行封锁，但维持控制将很困难。伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队仍保留了超过60%的快速攻击艇，伊朗可能会打击沙特和阿联酋的绕行管道，或通过代理人关闭曼德海峡。全球经济痛苦正在加剧：亚洲工厂正在削减产量，机场的航空燃油即将耗尽，海湾经济体预计将大幅萎缩——卡塔尔GDP将萎缩13%，阿联酋萎缩8%，沙特萎缩6.6%。封锁可能使全球市场每天额外减少200万桶石油供应。@wfwitness

text: Keir Starmer: We call for Lebanon to be included urgently in the ceasefire. Hezbollah must disarm. But I'm equally clear: Israel's strikes are wrong. The bombing should stop now.

text: The presidency issued the below: President Joseph Aoun, accompanied by the First Lady, receives a delegation from the families of the martyrs of the Ain Saadeh strike: The relevant security and judicial authorities are continuing their investigations to clarify the circumstances of this attack and take appropriate measures, and the state is exerting all efforts to stop the war and put an end to bloodshed.
text_zh: 总统府发布了以下内容：约瑟夫·奥恩总统在第一夫人的陪同下，接见了艾因萨德袭击事件烈士家属代表团：相关安全和司法部门正在继续调查，以澄清此次袭击的情况并采取适当措施，国家正在尽一切努力停止战争并结束流血事件。

The vessels include an aircraft carrier, destroyers, and support ships involved in maritime operations targeting Iranian shipping. @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇱 ⚡️ Belarus-Born Roman Goffman Approved as New Mossad Chief The occupation regime has appointed Roman Goffman as the new head of Mossad. Chosen by War Criminal Netanyahu, the move faces backlash as Goffman reportedly lacks intelligence credentials and is seen as another loyalist pick over competence. Even Zionist media resurfaced footage from October 7 showing him retreating under fire near Sderot before being wounded. From battlefield failure to spy chief, only in the Zionist regime.
text_zh: 🇮🇱 ⚡️ 白俄罗斯出生的罗曼·戈夫曼被批准为新任摩萨德局长。占领政权任命罗曼·戈夫曼为摩萨德新任负责人。由战犯内塔尼亚胡挑选，此举面临强烈反对，据报道戈夫曼缺乏情报资历，被视为又一个胜过能力的忠诚派人选。甚至犹太复国主义媒体也重新发布了10月7日的镜头，显示他在斯德洛特附近遭到炮火袭击时撤退，随后受伤。从战场失败到间谍头目，只发生在犹太复国主义政权。

text: OSINTdefender According to the Israel Defense Force (IDF), two IDF soldiers were moderately injured, with another 6 being lightly injured, following a Lebanese Hezbollah bomb-laden drone attack during IDF operations in southern Lebanon. The soldiers were transported to the hospital and their families have been notified, per reports. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender：据以色列国防军（IDF）称，在以色列国防军于黎巴嫩南部行动期间，黎巴嫩真主党发动了装甲无人机袭击，导致两名以色列国防军士兵中度受伤，另有6人轻伤。据报道，士兵已被送往医院，其家属已收到通知。 推文

text: Open Source Intel Since midnight last night, Hezbollah has launched 30 separate rocket and drone attacks against civilian targets in Northern Israel, each attack consists of multiple rockets. From airstrikes and artillery to interceptions and strikes on Hezbollah infrastructure, to non stop jet activity, it’s been very noisy where I live. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：自昨晚午夜以来，真主党已对以色列北部的平民目标发动了30次独立的火箭弹和无人机袭击，每次袭击都包含多枚火箭弹。从空袭和炮击到拦截和对真主党基础设施的打击，再到不停的喷气机活动，我住的地方一直非常吵闹。 推文

text: OSINTdefender U.S. President Donald J. Trump said on his Truth Social app that if any Iranian fast-attack vessels approach the now in effect U.S. blockade they will be “immediately eliminated” in the same manner that vessels operated by designated terrorist organizations in the Southern Command area of responsibility are. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender：美国总统唐纳德·J·特朗普在他的“真实社交”应用上表示，如果任何伊朗快速攻击艇靠近现已生效的美国封锁线，它们将以与南方司令部责任区内被指定恐怖组织操作的船只相同的方式“立即被消灭”。 推文

text: OSINTdefender RT @sentdefender : After attacking the Head of the Catholic Church, Pope Leo XIV, in a rambling post earlier tonight for his criticisms of the ongoing conflict in the Middle East, President Trump posted this AI image to TruthSocial, portraying himself as Jesus Christ. https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2043561732166070591/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 转推 @sentdefender：在今晚早些时候的一篇漫无边际的帖子中攻击了天主教会领袖教皇利奥十四世，因为他批评了中东正在进行的冲突，特朗普总统在“真实社交”上发布了这张人工智能生成的图片，将自己描绘成耶稣基督。https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2043561732166070591/photo/1 推文

text: Visioner 🇨🇳 🇮🇷 China's Ministry of Foreign Affairs denies the reports claiming that it is sending or planning to send weapons to Iran: China has always taken a cautious and responsible attitude in terms of military exports. We oppose groundless smears or malicious associations without any factual basis. tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇨🇳 🇮🇷 中国外交部否认了有关其正在或计划向伊朗运送武器的报道：中国在军事出口方面一贯采取审慎、负责任的态度。我们反对毫无根据的抹黑或没有事实依据的恶意联想。 推文

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇹 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 Lebanese President Joseph Aoun told the visiting Italian foreign minister that Lebanon hopes Tuesday’s meeting between the Lebanese, U.S., and Israeli ambassadors in Washington will lead to a ceasefire and open the door to direct talks. He said a solution is possible, but not with one side only; Israel must respond to calls from Lebanon, Arab states, and the international community to stop attacks and begin negotiations. Aoun stressed that negotiations with Israel are the sole responsibility of the Lebanese state, with no other party involved. He also said Lebanon has taken security measures at Rafic Hariri airport and other border crossings, both by sea and on land, to prevent the smuggling of arms or money, and that the army and security forces are working to prevent breaches of the country’s security and economic order. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇹 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 黎巴嫩总统约瑟夫·奥恩告诉到访的意大利外交部长，黎巴嫩希望周二在华盛顿举行的黎巴嫩、美国和以色列大使会议能促成停火，并为直接谈判打开大门。他说解决方案是可能的，但不能仅靠一方；以色列必须响应黎巴嫩、阿拉伯国家和国际社会的呼吁，停止袭击并开始谈判。奥恩强调，与以色列的谈判是黎巴嫩国家的唯一责任，没有其他方参与。他还表示，黎巴嫩已在拉菲克·哈里里机场和其他海陆边境口岸采取了安全措施，以防止武器或资金走私，军队和安全部队正在努力防止破坏国家安全和经济秩序的行为。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 A Hezbollah FPV drone targeted a house in Kiryat Shmona around 5:00pm, without any siren sounding. The homeowner extinguished the burning drone using a garden hose. No injuries were reported. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 一架真主党FPV无人机在下午5:00左右瞄准了基里亚特什莫纳的一所房屋，没有任何警报声响起。房主使用花园软管扑灭了燃烧的无人机。没有人员伤亡报告。@wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 🇻🇦 ⚡ 🇺🇸 The Iranian President Pezeshkian condemned Trump's insult to the Pope.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 🇻🇦 ⚡ 🇺🇸 伊朗总统佩泽希齐扬谴责了特朗普对教皇的侮辱。

text: 🇱🇧 ⚡ 🇮🇱 The Israeli regime army announced that 8 soldiers of this regime were injured in a Hezbollah drone attack in southern Lebanon.
text_zh: 🇱🇧 ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列政权军队宣布，该政权的8名士兵在黎巴嫩南部的一次真主党无人机袭击中受伤。

text: Situation in south Lebanon's Bint Jbeil continues to deteriorate, with many besieged defenders martyred following an Israeli bombardment and a commitment of several divisions and majority of elite units including Maglan, Egoz and others. The football field where Sayyed Hassan gave his 2006 speech in it is still living rent free in their heads and dedicated a statement about it May God bring peace to all the families of the martyrs and may God bestow patience for the rest May God avenge their blood
text_zh: 黎巴嫩南部宾特朱拜勒的局势继续恶化，在以色列轰炸和几个师以及包括Maglan、Egoz等在内的大多数精锐部队的投入后，许多被围困的守军殉难。赛义德·哈桑在2006年发表演讲的足球场仍然在他们的脑海中挥之不去，并为此发表了一份声明。愿上帝给所有烈士家属带来和平，愿上帝赐予其余人耐心。愿上帝为他们的鲜血复仇

text: 🇩🇪 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 ⚡️ German Chancellor Friedrich Merz: We will continue to feel the consequences of the war in Iran for a long time, even after it is over. We are preparing ourselves for a prolonged period of significant strain on the German economy, and therefore also on private households.
text_zh: 🇩🇪 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 ⚡️ 德国总理弗里德里希·默茨：即使在伊朗战争结束后，我们将长期感受到战争的后果。我们正在为德国经济，进而也为私人家庭长期承受巨大压力做好准备。

text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Red alert sirens are sounding near Karmiel, Sakhnin, and other surrounding areas in Northern Israel: • Confrontation Line • Lower Galilee • Upper Galilee @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部卡尔米尔、萨赫宁及周边地区响起红色警报：• 对抗线 • 下加利利 • 上加利利 @wfwitness

text: For the second day in a row, 8 Israeli soldiers were injured when a Hezbullah suicide drone or FPV successfully impacted their gathering in south Lebanon
text_zh: 连续第二天，8名以色列士兵在黎巴嫩南部被真主党自杀式无人机或FPV成功击中他们的聚集地而受伤

text: More than 10 Hezbullah drones launched from Lebanon at northern Israel and at troops in southern Lebanon since this morning. Rocket fire was also fired at Israeli settlements.
text_zh: 自今天早上以来，从黎巴嫩向以色列北部和黎巴嫩南部的部队发射了10多架真主党无人机。火箭弹也射向了以色列定居点。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇱🇧🇮🇱🇺🇸 A senior Hezbollah official, Nawaf al‑Mousawi, said that the group’s agenda for any negotiations with Israel is the liberation of Lebanese land. “Israel will not move from a single grain of soil unless pushed by force,” he stated, adding that…" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Hezbollah MP Hussein al-Hajj Hassan, touring a site in Beirut's southern suburbs hit by Israeli airstrikes, criticized Lebanese Foreign Minister Youssef Rajji for stating that Lebanon had separated its path from Iran's ahead of Tuesday's negotiations with Israel. "Congratulations! The path of Lebanon with Israel has begun. Find some benefit for Lebanon from this path with the enemy that has killed here and throughout Lebanon," he said. Al-Hajj Hassan vowed that Hezbollah will not give up its principles, resistance, sovereignty, or land. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇱🇧🇮🇱🇺🇸 真主党高级官员纳瓦夫·穆萨维表示，该组织与以色列任何谈判的议程都是解放黎巴嫩土地。“除非被武力推动，否则以色列不会从一粒土壤上移开，”他表示，并补充说……” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 真主党议员侯赛因·哈吉·哈桑在参观贝鲁特南部郊区被以色列空袭袭击的地点时，批评黎巴嫩外交部长尤瑟夫·拉吉表示黎巴嫩在周二与以色列谈判前已将其道路与伊朗分开。“恭喜！黎巴嫩与以色列的道路已经开始。从这条与在各地杀戮的敌人打交道的道路中为黎巴嫩找到一些好处吧，”他说。哈吉·哈桑发誓真主党不会放弃其原则、抵抗、主权或土地。@wfwitness

text: Russian-purchased Mi-28 combat helicopters reportedly spotted in Iran’s skies. Note: We cannot confirm whether the footage is recent.
text_zh: 据报道，在伊朗天空中发现了俄罗斯购买的米-28战斗直升机。注：我们无法确认镜头是否是最近的。

text: Paris court convicted French cement giant Lafarge (now part of Holcim) of financing terrorism in Syria and violating EU sanctions. Between 2013–2014, Lafarge’s Syrian subsidiary paid about €5.6 million to armed groups — including ISIS — to keep its cement plant operating during the Syrian civil war. The company and eight former executives were found guilty. Former CEO Bruno Lafont received a six-year prison sentence. Lafarge had already pleaded guilty in the U.S. in 2022 and paid $778 million for providing material support to terrorist groups.
text_zh: 巴黎法院判决法国水泥巨头拉法基（现为豪瑞集团的一部分）在叙利亚资助恐怖主义并违反欧盟制裁。2013年至2014年间，拉法基的叙利亚子公司向包括ISIS在内的武装团体支付了约560万欧元，以维持其水泥厂在叙利亚内战期间的运营。该公司和八名前高管被判有罪。前首席执行官布鲁诺·拉丰被判处六年监禁。拉法基已于2022年在美国认罪，并因向恐怖组织提供物质支持支付了7.78亿美元。

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 The Israeli Supreme Court ruled that the IDF must ensure equal opportunities for men and women in assignments to all positions, including combat roles. In addition, the IDF was required to allow women to participate in a trial program in the maneuvering Armored Corps starting this coming November. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 以色列最高法院裁定，以色列国防军必须确保男女在所有职位的分配中享有平等机会，包括战斗角色。此外，以色列国防军被要求允许女性从今年11月开始参加机动装甲部队的试验计划。@wfwitness

text: 🇺🇦 💥 This morning in Dnepropetrovsk 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇦 💥 今天早上在第聂伯罗彼得罗夫斯克 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
